tasks.label: PI RN Casefile — Open Last
args: LATEST=$(ls -t outputs/casefile/*/casefile_v1.html 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$LATEST" ]; then if command -v open >/dev/null 2>&1; then open "$LATEST"; elif command -v xdg-open >/dev/null 2>&1; then xdg-open "$LATEST"; else echo "Open manually: $LATEST"; fi; echo "Opened: $LATEST"; else echo 'No casefile found.'; fi
